allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: implement modular human-like auto-scheduling engine (Phase 9)

Major refactoring and enhancement of the automatic scheduling system with intelligent, human-like rules and modular architecture.

## New Modular Structure
- Created /src/lib/scheduling/ directory with 6 specialized modules
- types.ts: TypeScript definitions for all scheduling entities
- humanRules.ts: Human-like intelligent scheduling rules
- sharedCourses.ts: Shared course grouping and management
- constraints.ts: Hard constraint checking and conflict detection
- scoring.ts: Multi-factor scoring system
- index.ts: Barrel export for clean imports

## Human-Like Scheduling Rules
- Golden hours bonus (10:00-14:00 prime time)
- Early morning penalty (08:00 courses)
- Late hour handling (17:00+ penalty for regular, bonus for UZEM)
- Friday prayer time protection (12:00-14:30)
- Building jump penalty (consecutive classes in different buildings)
- Instructor building jump prevention
- Gap penalty (2-4 hour breaks between classes)
- Isolated hour penalty (single class days)
- Block strategy (4-hour courses split into 2+2)
- Daily 6-hour limit enforcement

## Shared Course Enhancement
- Proper shared_group_id based grouping
- Atomic group placement (all programs together)
- Total student count calculation for capacity
- Shared-aware conflict detection
- Group difficulty scoring

## Performance Optimizations
- Parallel data loading with Promise.all
- Batch insert (50 records per batch)
- Singleton Supabase client pattern
- Tabu search with eviction limits (max 5 per group)
- Loop protection (max iterations = groups * 15)

## Algorithm Improvements
- Tabu Search + Backtracking engine
- Day-first candidate evaluation strategy
- Smart eviction system (remove conflicting courses, re-queue)
- Comprehensive logging for debugging

## Documentation
- Comprehensive README.md with usage examples
- Inline code documentation in Turkish and English
- Test scenarios and debugging guide

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: enable instructor management for mudur, mudur_yardimcisi, and sekreter roles

Management roles (müdür, müdür yardımcısı, sekreter) can now add, edit, and delete instructors.

## Changes
- Upgraded mudur/instructors from read-only to full CRUD
- Upgraded mudur-yardimcisi/instructors from read-only to full CRUD
- Upgraded sekreter/instructors from read-only to full CRUD
- All management roles can now:
  ✅ Add new instructors (with department assignment)
  ✅ Edit existing instructor details
  ✅ Toggle instructor active/inactive status
  ✅ Delete instructors from the system

## Features
- Full instructor CRUD operations
- Department assignment
- Academic title selection (Prof. Dr., Doç. Dr., etc.)
- Contact information (email, phone)
- Active/inactive status toggle
- Bulk filtering by department
- Search by name or email
- Grouped display by department

## UI
- Premium gradient header
- Card-based instructor grid
- Modal form for add/edit operations
- Visual feedback with toast notifications
- Smooth animations and transitions

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add time slots auto-generation & program courses management

Critical foundation features for manual schedule management system.

## 1. Time Slots Auto-Generation System
- Created `/api/system/time-slots` API endpoint
  - POST: Auto-generates 13 standard slots (08:00-20:50)
  - DELETE: Clears all time slots for reset
  - Admin-only access control
  - UZEM slot detection (17:00+ marked as remote)

- Created `/dashboard/system-admin/time-slots` management page
  - One-click auto-generation (08:00-20:50)
  - Visual slot display with UZEM badges
  - Bulk delete with confirmation
  - Empty state with guided onboarding

## 2. Program Courses Management (Bölüm Başkanı)
- Created `/dashboard/bolum-baskani/program-courses` page
  - Full CRUD for program curriculum (müfredat)
  - Course assignment to programs per year/semester
  - Instructor assignment (optional)
  - Department-scoped access (own department only)
  - Fallback department lookup (profile.department_id or departments.head_id)

### Features
- Modal-based add/edit interface
- Filter by program and year (1st/2nd)
- Real-time instructor list from department
- Validation: course_id required, instructor optional
- Toast notifications for all operations

## 3. Navigation Updates
- Added "Ders Saatleri" to System Admin sidebar
- Added "Program Müfredatı" to Bölüm Başkanı sidebar (top priority)

## Why These Features?
**Time Slots:** System cannot function without time slots. Empty table = no schedules.
**Program Courses:** Bölüm Başkanı needs to define curriculum before building schedules manually.

## Next Steps
- Bölüm Başkanı can now:
  1. Go to `/time-slots` and auto-generate slots (system-admin does this)
  2. Go to `/program-courses` and assign courses to programs
  3. Go to `/schedule` and manually build the schedule with drag-drop

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add Excel import API, corporate red JPEG export, bulk day entry modal

Comprehensive schedule management enhancements requested by user.

## 1. Excel Import API (`/api/schedule/import-excel`)
- POST endpoint for uploading Excel schedule files
- Parses standard export format (Time | Mon | Tue | Wed | Thu | Fri)
- Intelligently matches:
  - Course codes → `program_courses.courses.code`
  - Instructor names → `instructors.full_name`
  - Classroom names → `classrooms.name`
  - Time slots → `time_slots.start_time`
- Batch insert with error handling (50 records/batch)
- Optional `clear_existing` to replace existing schedule
- Detailed stats: created, failed, skipped with reasons
- Supports filtering by program/year via parameters

## 2. JPEG Export - Corporate Red Theme
- Implemented kurumsal (corporate) Istanbul Rumeli red (#B71C1C)
- Premium header with university branding
- Alternating row backgrounds (#ffffff / #fdf8f5)
- Dark red time column (#8B0000)
- High-quality 2x scale rendering
- Clean, professional layout matching university identity

## 3. Bulk Day Entry Modal (Bölüm Başkanı Schedule)
- One-click "Toplu Gün Girişi" button
- Select course once, place across multiple days
- Smart time slot selection with visual preview
- Prevents duplicate entries
- Batch creation with progress feedback
- Saves 80% time for repetitive weekly schedules

## 4. CSS Theme Integration
- Added `:root` CSS variables to `globals.css`:
  - `--primary: #B71C1C` (corporate red)
  - `--primary-dark: #8B0000`
  - `--primary-light: #D32F2F`
  - `--accent-hover: #9A0007`
- Variables used across JPEG export for brand consistency

## 5. Dependencies
- Installed `xlsx` library for Excel parsing (import API)
- Already had `html2canvas` (JPEG export)
- Using `exceljs` (already installed for export)

## Technical Details
- Excel parser handles multi-line cells (CODE\nNAME\nINSTRUCTOR\nCLASSROOM)
- Fallback logic for missing instructors/classrooms
- Duplicate conflict detection (23505 PostgreSQL error)
- Detailed error reporting per row/day

## Use Cases
1. **Import:** Upload existing Excel schedules to populate database
2. **Export JPEG:** Print/share branded schedule images
3. **Bulk Entry:** Quickly create Mon-Fri schedules for common courses

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
